{
  "claims": [
    "Two-thirds of California’s homeless population is unsheltered, the highest rate in the country.",
    "SB 606 would require local jurisdictions to assess the shelter and housing resources necessary to bring all unsheltered people indoors.",
    "SB 606 uses tools like the Shelter Crisis Act to expedite housing development.",
    "SB 606 promotes regional collaboration so that smaller cities contribute to solutions.",
    "Successful local models, such as San Jose’s data-driven strategy, have shown that coordinated, adequately funded plans can reduce unsheltered homelessness.",
